name: Broccoli & Angel Hair Pasta
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the broccoli into small pieces.
2. Chop the garlic elephant head into small pieces.
3. Place the broccoli in a microwave-safe container. Add about 1/4 cup water. Cover lightly with plastic wrap.
4. Cook in the microwave on high for 3-5 minutes, checking for doneness to keep the broccoli slightly crisp.
5. While the broccoli is cooking, cook the Angel hair pasta until it is slightly firm. Drain the pasta.
6. Melt a stick of butter in the pan used to cook the angel hair pasta. Add the cooked angel hair back into the pan and toss to coat the pasta.
7. Add the broccoli and toss lightly.
8. Pour some olive oil into a small frying pan. Add the chopped garlic and crushed red pepper. Cook until the garlic browns. The garlic will clump together when done.
9. Pour over the pasta and broccoli, then sprinkle with parmesan cheese. Optionally add white pepper if desired.
10. Toss everything well mixed.
